gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Bukchon Hanok Village
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Village dating to the 14th century filled with narrow streets lined with restored traditional homes.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Free guided tours are offered of this large 14th-century royal palace with a museum & gardens.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Samcheong-dong Street
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Street featuring classic Korean architecture mixed with modern boutiques, restaurants & more.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Changgyeonggung Palace
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Complex of 4 grand traditional Korean palaces, shrines & gardens for guided & self guided tours.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Namsangol Hanok Village
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Tours & cultural programs inside a recreated Korean village with 5 restored hanoks, built 1392–1910.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Cheonggyecheon
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Recreational area constructed around a revived stream with walkways, bridges & greenery.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Ikseon-dong Hanok Village
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Trendy suburb with a village atmosphere, traditional buildings, boutiques & restaurants.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Stairway Alley to Bukchon Hanok Village
Deoksugung Palace
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Historic palace in the heart of Seoul offering a popular Changing of the Royal Guard ceremony.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Geunjeongjeon
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Grand residence of the 14th-century Joseon Dynasty, now housing museums of folklore & royal culture.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Gyeonghoeru Pavilion
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Part of a wider palace complex, this ornate, 2-story pavilion sits by a calm, artificial pond.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Bukhansan National Park
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Mountain park crisscrossed with trails & home to a number of historic temples & a fortress.

gyeongbokgung-bukchon.name: Namsan Mountain Park
gyeongbokgung-bukchon.description: Seoul’s largest park, a tranquil, hilly forest with trails, an observatory tower & a cable car.

myeongdong-namsan.name: N Seoul Tower
myeongdong-namsan.description: Opened in 1980, this iconic tower offers panoramic views of the city & a revolving restaurant.

myeongdong-namsan.name: Lotte World
myeongdong-namsan.description: Theme park rides, water flumes & marine life exhibits in a family centred 3-in-1 adventure park.

myeongdong-namsan.name: Myeongdong Cathedral
myeongdong-namsan.description: Brick-built, 19th-century, Gothic-style Catholic cathedral with a 45m-high bell tower.

myeongdong-namsan.name: Namdaemun Market
myeongdong-namsan.description: Opened in 1964, this large area of stalls offers clothes, household goods & local items.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Hongdae Street
hongdae-sinchon.description: Cool hangout known for its neon-lit bars & clubs, murals, fashion stores & street performers.

hongdae-sinchon.name: 트릭아이뮤지엄
hongdae-sinchon.description: Optical illusion museum with nautical, horror & fantasy backdrops for selfie lovers.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Yeouido Hangang Park
hongdae-sinchon.description: Large, popular park on the river featuring scenic views, plus running paths & a swimming pool.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Gyeongui Line Forest Park
hongdae-sinchon.description: Former train line converted into a leafy park with pathways, lawns & streams, plus cafes nearby.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Haneul Park
hongdae-sinchon.description: Picturesque landscape featuring paths through tall, lush grass to a hilltop with sweeping vistas.

hongdae-sinchon.name: 홍대 맛집 새벽 | Hongdae restaurant | 홍대 술집 | Hongdae Bar & Pub Saebyeok
Heunginjimun Gate (Dongdaemun)
hongdae-sinchon.description: This restored gate was part of the Fortress Wall of Seoul built during the Joseon Dynasty.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Changdeokgung
hongdae-sinchon.description: Tours are offered of this large Joseon dynasty palace & its surrounding gardens.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Bongwonsa Temple
hongdae-sinchon.description: Many monks live at this historic Buddhist temple in lush, scenic hillside surrounds.

hongdae-sinchon.name: Ansan Mountain
hongdae-sinchon.description: Forested mountain peak accessed via a boardwalk, with an observation point overlooking Seoul.

itaewon-hannam.name: War Memorial of Korea
itaewon-hannam.description: Museum charting Korea's conflicts, with exhibition rooms, monuments & an outdoor vehicle display.

itaewon-hannam.name: 타닥타닥 솥밥 더룸 한남 데이트 | The Best Korean Hot Pot Rice (Sotbap) near Itaewon | 汉南洞美食 · 韩식釜饭 · 必吃榜
Gyeongnidan-gil Street
itaewon-hannam.description: Lively street with long-standing buildings housing fashionable cafes, eateries, bars & boutiques.

itaewon-hannam.name: Bongeunsa Temple
itaewon-hannam.description: Traditional Korean Buddhist temple complex with a 23 m Maitreya Buddha statue.

itaewon-hannam.name: Jingwansa Temple
itaewon-hannam.description: Centuries-old Buddhist temple with a teahouse, scenic grounds & a stay program for visitors.

itaewon-hannam.name: Naksan Park
itaewon-hannam.description: Hilltop green space with exercise paths & a few observation decks for day & night city views.

itaewon-hannam.name: Yongsan Family Park
itaewon-hannam.description: Family-friendly recreation space with a small lake, pagodas & trails through cherry blossom trees.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: SEA LIFE COEX, Seoul Aquarium
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Large aquarium exhibiting habitats from deep sea to reef & mangrove with touch pools & tunnels.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: K-Star Road
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Busy shopping avenue celebrating the stars of Korean pop with symbols painted onto model bears.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: Starfield Coex Mall
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Massive underground shopping mall & convention center with a theater, aquarium & restaurants.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: Jogyesa Temple
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Main temple for Jogye Korean Buddhism, with a large main hall & large seated Buddha statue.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: Gilsangsa Temple
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Buddhist temple, founded in 1997, with tours, meditation halls, cultural classes & tea ceremonies.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: Seoul Forest Park
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Vast, tree-filled park featuring a lake, bike path & roses, plus deer to feed & a butterfly house.

gangnam-apgujeong.name: Banpo Hangang Park
gangnam-apgujeong.description: Relaxed park for riverside walks, bike rides & sports, plus views of an illuminated bridge fountain.

insadong-jongno.name: Alive Museum, Insadong Branch
insadong-jongno.description: Family-friendly museum featuring a variety of funky, life-size exhibits & photo-op displays.

insadong-jongno.name: Jongmyo Shrine
insadong-jongno.description: Ritual ceremonies still take place at this Confucian shrine dedicated to Joseon dynasty royals.

insadong-jongno.name: Seoul City Wall Trail
insadong-jongno.description: Pedestrian path beside a 14th-century wall, passing a park, observation deck & landmark buildings.

haeundae-beach.name: Haeundae Beach
haeundae-beach.description: Expansive beach with lively crowds & convenient access to a variety of hotels, cafes & restaurants.

haeundae-beach.name: Cheongsapo Daritdol Skywalk
haeundae-beach.description: 72.5-m-long ocean observation pier in the shape of a blue dragon, with village & lighthouse views.

haeundae-beach.name: Oryukdo Skywalk
haeundae-beach.description: Free-admission cantilever walkway with a glass floor offering views of the sea & Oryukdo island.

haeundae-beach.name: Haedong Yonggungsa Temple
haeundae-beach.description: Enduring Buddhist temple constructed in the 14th-century & offering sweeping views of the sea.

haeundae-beach.name: SEALIFE Busan Aquarium
haeundae-beach.description: Family-friendly exhibits with a variety of sea creatures (most offer play areas & group packages).

haeundae-beach.name: Huinnyeoul Culture Village
haeundae-beach.description: Arty, regenerated cultural village with narrow alleys, street murals & a waterside walking path.

haeundae-beach.name: Beomeosa Temple
haeundae-beach.description: Founded by the master priest UiSang in 678 A.D., this is one of Korea's HwaEom Buddhist temples.

gamcheon-culture-village.name: Gamcheon Culture Village
gamcheon-culture-village.description: Picturesque attraction featuring a village of colorful houses, painted murals, shops & cafes.

gamcheon-culture-village.name: Taejongdae
gamcheon-culture-village.description: Clifftop park area featuring an observatory with water views, plus a train ride, lighthouse & more.

gamcheon-culture-village.name: BIFF Square
gamcheon-culture-village.description: Bustling area featuring first-run movie theaters, street food & handprints of famous Korean actors.

gamcheon-culture-village.name: Little Prince and Desert Fox Statue
Songdo Bay Station (Songdo Cable Car)
gamcheon-culture-village.description: Stalwart aerial tram, now with glass-bottom cars for views of the surrounding sea & mountains.

gamcheon-culture-village.name: Gamcheon Culture Village Asteroid B612 Cafe
Stairs to See Stars 별 보러 가는 계단
Songdo Cloud Trails
gamcheon-culture-village.description: Winding walkway at Songdo Beach, with views of a lighthouse & a cable car line overhead.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Jagalchi Market
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: World famous market for fresh fish & seafood to take away or eat at the informal stalls.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Gukje Market
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Lively, sprawling marketplace with vendors selling street food, home goods & souvenirs.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Yongdusan Park
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Mountain park known for its 129m-high observation tower, statues & stone monuments.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Busan Tower
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Sweeping views are the highlight atop this 118-m. tower with an observation deck & cafe.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: 国際市場モクチャコルモッ
Bupyeong Kkangtong Market
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Vibrant, covered market featuring produce, local foods, clothes & street-food vendors.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Busan Citizens Park
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Large urban park on a onetime U.S. army base, with walking paths, playgrounds & a musical fountain.

jagalchi-nampo-market.name: Samnak Ecological Park
jagalchi-nampo-market.description: Popular park featuring bird habitats, walking paths & many courts & fields for sports.

gwangalli-millak.name: Gwangan Bridge
gwangalli-millak.description: Bi-level highway suspension bridge with impressive views, featuring a seasonal light display.

gwangalli-millak.name: Millak Waterside Park
gwangalli-millak.description: Waterfront park & picnic destination with bridge views, plenty of seating & regular events.

gwangalli-millak.name: Seokbulsa
gwangalli-millak.description: Mountainside Buddhist temple & hiking destination known for its relief carvings on the cliff walls.

gwangalli-millak.name: 홍법사
gwangalli-millak.description: Expansive temple with a large bronze Buddha statue, verdant surrounds & various cultural activities.

gwangalli-millak.name: Igidae
gwangalli-millak.description: Popular recreation site with hiking, rock cliffs, wooden steps & views of the city & mountains.

jeju-city-centre.name: Hallim Park
jeju-city-centre.description: Popular destination with a variety of scenic gardens, two caves & a small zoo, plus a folk village.

jeju-city-centre.name: Spirited Garden
jeju-city-centre.description: With 7 small gardens & native bonsai, this picturesque spot also features a 3-story cafe.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jeju Stone Park (DolMoonHwa GongWon)
jeju-city-centre.description: Park with volcanic stone sculptures related to the culture & history of Jeju, plus a museum & shop.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jusangjeolli Cliff
jeju-city-centre.description: Rugged cliff face formed from angular volcanic pillars of rock & listed as a national monument.

jeju-city-centre.name: 용연구름다리
jeju-city-centre.description: Deep inlet flanked by wooded cliffs, with a landmark bridge & pavilion famed for night views.

jeju-city-centre.name: Seongsan Ilchulbong
jeju-city-centre.description: Iconic volcanic cone with a bowl-like crater with a popular hiking route & paid entry.

jeju-city-centre.name: 제주절물자연휴양림
jeju-city-centre.description: Tranquil park featuring cedar-forest hiking trails, a volcanic hill, picnic tables & playgrounds.

jeju-city-centre.name: Maze Land
jeju-city-centre.description: Mazes are constructed out of hedges & walls with varying dificulties at this family attraction.

jeju-city-centre.name: Halla Arboretum, Jeju Island,S.Korea
jeju-city-centre.description: Lush arboretum with over 1,100 kinds of local & subtropical plants, plus scenic walking trails.

jeju-city-centre.name: Mysterious Road
jeju-city-centre.description: Offbeat attraction with the optical illusion of a downward-sloping hill that looks like an incline.

jeju-city-centre.name: Yongmeori Coast
jeju-city-centre.description: A popular place to walk, this rocky coastline features unique cliff formations & scenic ocean views.

jeju-city-centre.name: Bijarim Forest
jeju-city-centre.description: This natural monument consists of thousands of nutmeg trees ranging from 500 to 800 years old.

jeju-city-centre.name: Oedolgae
jeju-city-centre.description: Dramatic cliffside views are the highlight of this scenic lookout point with trails & swimming.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jeju Folklore and Natural History Museum
jeju-city-centre.description: 4 exhibition halls of artifacts & models tracing the natural history & cultural traditions of Jeju.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jeju Folk Village 제주민속촌
jeju-city-centre.description: Restored 1890s village featuring more than 100 structures & displays of period artifacts.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jeju World Natural Heritage Center
jeju-city-centre.description: Visitor center with high-tech exhibits on the island's volcanic origins, including a replica cave.

jeju-city-centre.name: Jeju National Museum
jeju-city-centre.description: Natural- & cultural-history museum in a contemporary building focusing on the island of Jeju.

jeju-city-centre.name: Gwaneumsa Temple Jeju
jeju-city-centre.description: Serene mountainside complex with meditation halls, hundreds of Buddha statues & overnight stays.

jeju-city-centre.name: Museum of Chusa Kim Jeong Hyui
대한불교조계종 약천사
jeju-city-centre.description: Expansive temple with a large pagoda & a Dharma hall with the nation's largest wooden Buddha statue.

jeju-city-centre.name: Hueree Nature Life Park
jeju-city-centre.description: Scenic, serene park with many flowers & plants, plus pony rides & small animals, such as pigs.

hallasan-mountain.name: Hallasan National Park
hallasan-mountain.description: National park with a large mountain, featuring many alpine plants, hiking trails & sweeping views.

hallasan-mountain.name: Eoseungsaengak Trail
hallasan-mountain.description: Short hiking trail up a volcanic cone with views of Mount Hallasan & Jeju city at the summit.

hallasan-mountain.name: Hallasan
hallasan-mountain.description: Hiking is allowed during daytime only on this shield volcano, the highest peak in South Korea.

hallasan-mountain.name: 한라산국립공원 영실 탐방로
hallasan-mountain.description: Hiking trail known for its scenic beauty in all seasons, with a rest area & a shelter.

hallasan-mountain.name: Camellia Hill Botanical Garden
hallasan-mountain.description: Opened in 1979, this year-round arboretum on 20 hectares offers many camellia & other plant species.

hallasan-mountain.name: Sanbangsan Bomunsa Temple
hallasan-mountain.description: Hilltop Buddhist temple offering ornate designs & colorful statues, plus vast water & cliff views.

seongsan-ilchulbong.name: Seopjikoji
seongsan-ilchulbong.description: Quiet, seafront beach area offering a lighthouse, restaurants & shops, plus scenic views & trails.

seongsan-ilchulbong.name: 일출랜드
seongsan-ilchulbong.description: Park offering many themed gardens, sculptures & walks in Micheon Cave, a large lava tunnel.

seongsan-ilchulbong.name: Seongsan Ilchulbong
seongsan-ilchulbong.description: Formed by volcanic eruptions, this unique, crater-style peak is said to resemble an ancient castle.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Yeomiji Botanic Garden
jungmun-resort-south.description: Large, scenic botanical garden featuring a massive, contemporary greenhouse with many plant species.

jungmun-resort-south.name: 중문관광단지
jungmun-resort-south.description: Lively complex with lodgings, beaches, water sports, trails, falls, dining & a teddy bear museum.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Seogwipo Jeongbang Waterfall
jungmun-resort-south.description: Oceanside 75-ft. waterfall cascading from a cliff, with its waters flowing into the sea.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Cheonjeyeon Waterfalls
jungmun-resort-south.description: Water cascades from a cave to form this storied, 3-tier waterfall surrounded by greenery.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Jungmun Saekdal Beach
jungmun-resort-south.description: Compact beach & surfing spot with large waves, showers & access to a nearby eatery.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Seongeup Folk Village
jungmun-resort-south.description: Old-fashioned village featuring simple homes built of thatch & lava rock, with iconic stone statues.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Gwandeokjeong
jungmun-resort-south.description: Complex of historic buildings featuring a museum on Jeju along with a pond, gardens & artifacts.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Samseonghyeol
jungmun-resort-south.description: Tranquil shrine dating to 1526, with 3 holes connected to an origin legend & an exhibit hall.

jungmun-resort-south.name: Jejumok Gwana
jungmun-resort-south.description: Administrative center dating to the 14th century, reconstructed with reference to original plans.

manjanggul-cave-east.name: Manjanggul Lava Tube
manjanggul-cave-east.description: Long lava tube with unique formations, including stalactites & stalagmites, plus bats & insects.

manjanggul-cave-east.name: Gimnyeong Maze Park
manjanggul-cave-east.description: Leafy public park featuring a playground, ample green space & an elaborate topiary maze.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Seokguram Grotto
bulguksa-seokguram.description: This famous, historical hermitage features acclaimed Buddhist sculptures & sea views.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Bulguksa
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Completed in 774, this Buddhist temple complex on the slopes of Mount Toham features 2 pagodas.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Donggung Palace & Wolji Pond
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Palace complex & manmade pond with 3 islets, dating to circa 674 CE & filled with lotus in summer.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Gyeongju World
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Large theme park with roller coasters, plus a water park in summer & ice sledding in winter.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Golgulsa Temple
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Serene temple with cliff caves & a huge Buddha carved from granite, plus martial arts performances.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Woljeonggyo Bridge
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Ornate reconstructed Silla Dynasty bridge, with night-time illuminations reflecting on the water.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Cheomseongdae Observatory
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Cyclindrical remains of an early observatory built using 362 stones to represent the solar year.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Gyeongju Tower
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Vast edifice with a central cut-out in the shape of a pagoda & expansive views from the top.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Daereungwon Tomb Complex
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Excavated in 1973, this ancient burial tomb of an unknown king contained 11,000+ artifacts.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Seokgatap (Sakyamuni Pagoda)
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Soaring 3-story stone pagoda, part of the Bulguksa Temple complex on Mount Toham.

bulguksa-seokguram.name: Three-story Stone Pagoda of Gameunsa Temple Site
Gyeongju National Park Office
bulguksa-seokguram.description: Historical national park known for its scenic mountains, hiking trails, royal gardens & temples.

tumuli-park-daereungwon.name: Cheonmachong
tumuli-park-daereungwon.description: Burial mound unearthed in 1973 & created in the 5th or 6th century, with a wooden room & artifacts.

tumuli-park-daereungwon.name: Tomb of King Munmu
tumuli-park-daereungwon.description: Rocky outcrop just offshore marking the underwater grave of the 7th-century King Munmu.

tumuli-park-daereungwon.name: Hwangnidan-gil Street
tumuli-park-daereungwon.description: Popular street with ornate hanok-style Korean architecture, atmospheric cafes & shops.

tumuli-park-daereungwon.name: Tomb of King Michu of Silla
Yangdong Folk Village
tumuli-park-daereungwon.description: Old-fashioned village with many historic structures, including traditional thatch-roofed huts.

gyeongju-downtown.name: Gyeongju National Museum
gyeongju-downtown.description: Museum with exhibits detailing Gyeongju's cultural history as country's former royal capital, Silla.

gyeongju-downtown.name: Gyeongju Gyochon Traditional Village
gyeongju-downtown.description: Traditional buildings, living exhibits, events & local liquor are among this tourist hub's draws.

gyeongju-downtown.name: Hwangnyongsa Temple Site
gyeongju-downtown.description: Former site of a towering, 9-story temple built in the 7th century entirely without nails.

anapji-pond-area.name: Wolseong Fortress
anapji-pond-area.description: Ruins of the moat & fortress walls of a ca.-57-BCE royal palace, plus a ca.-18th-c. stone ice house.

namsan-mountain.name: Stone-carved Buddhas at Chilburam, Namsan, Gyeongju
N Seoul Tower
namsan-mountain.description: Opened in 1980, this iconic tower offers panoramic views of the city & a revolving restaurant.

namsan-mountain.name: Namsan
namsan-mountain.description: With a peak of 860 ft., this mountain offers trails & skyline views, plus the iconic N Seoul Tower.

namsan-mountain.name: Stone Standing Buddha Triad in Bae-dong, Gyeongju
Seated Stone Buddha at Bulgok Valley

hanok-village-core.name: Jeonju Hanok Village
hanok-village-core.description: Cultural village with traditional Korean Hanok houses, plus calligraphy & sake museums.

hanok-village-core.name: Jaman Mural Village
hanok-village-core.description: Cluster of hillside houses & narrow passageways adorned with  a range of anime-style murals.

hanok-village-core.name: Deokjin Park
hanok-village-core.description: Tranquil garden noted for lotus flowers on the lake & a decorative pagoda accessed by wooden bridge.

hanok-village-core.name: Gyeonggijeon Shrine
hanok-village-core.description: Built in 1410, this celebrated shrine features history exhibits & a museum with royal portraits.

hanok-village-core.name: Omokdae
hanok-village-core.description: Hilltop lookout with views over Hanok Village & a monument for the founder of the Joseon dynasty.

hanok-village-core.name: Jeonju Hyanggyo
hanok-village-core.description: Joseon-era traditional school complex spanning several buildings & surrounded by huge ginkgo trees.

hanok-village-core.name: Ikseon-dong Hanok Village
hanok-village-core.description: Trendy suburb with a village atmosphere, traditional buildings, boutiques & restaurants.

hanok-village-core.name: Pungnammun Gate
hanok-village-core.description: Restored stone-and-wood remnant of Jeonju fortress walls, now a local landmark on a traffic island.

hanok-village-core.name: Bukchon Hanok Village
hanok-village-core.description: Village dating to the 14th century filled with narrow streets lined with restored traditional homes.

jeonju-downtown-palpal.name: Nambu Market
jeonju-downtown-palpal.description: Traditional Korean market with many offerings, such as produce, handcrafted goods & street food.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Hwaseong Haenggung
hwaseong-fortress.description: Set amid a fortress, this restored, 1789 palace offers a visitor center, theater & exhibition hall.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Suwon Hwaseong Fortress
hwaseong-fortress.description: 18th-century fortress with ancient city walls & some original structures offering old city access.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Hwahongmun Gate (Buksumun)
hwaseong-fortress.description: Floodgate protecting an 18th-century fort, on a river bridge with 7 arches & illuminated at night.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Janganmun Gate
hwaseong-fortress.description: Imposing, late 18th-century fortress gate with a curve-roofed tower mounted on a massive stone base.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Paldalmun Gate
hwaseong-fortress.description: Sizable southern gate of the late 18th-century Hwaseong Fortress, with a 2-story wooden pavilion.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Suwon Hwaseong Museum
hwaseong-fortress.description: Museum with relics from Hwaseong Fortress, plus exhibits on its construction & models of the site.

hwaseong-fortress.name: Gwanggyo Lake Park
hwaseong-fortress.description: Urban park offering a lake & forest, plus rock-climbing structures, a water feature & outdoor stage.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Korean Folk Village
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Living-museum village showcasing traditional Korean homes & customs, plus dining & a theme park.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Everland
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Popular amusement park featuring rides, shows, shops, eateries & themed zones, including a zoo.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Yongin Dae Jang Geum Park
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Outdoor film sets opened to visitors, with buildings from the Samguk, Goryeo & Joseon periods.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Bukchon Hanok Village
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Village dating to the 14th century filled with narrow streets lined with restored traditional homes.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Jeonju Hanok Village
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Cultural village with traditional Korean Hanok houses, plus calligraphy & sake museums.

korean-folk-village-nearby.name: Hwadamsup
korean-folk-village-nearby.description: Peaceful paths with views of spring flowers & fall leaves in a botanic garden surrounded by forest.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Seoraksan Cable Car
seoraksan-national-park.description: Aerial cable car offering rides to a site with medieval fortress remains & picturesque views.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Seoraksan National Park
seoraksan-national-park.description: Large, mountainous national park with waterfalls, diverse flora & fauna & hiking trails.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Biryong Falls
seoraksan-national-park.description: Thin stream of water cascading into a green pool, reached by a popular trail through bamboo forest.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Yeonggeumjeong Sunrise Pavilion
seoraksan-national-park.description: Ornate seaside pavilion on a rocky outcrop, accessible by a bridge that's illuminated at night.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Ulsanbawi Rock
seoraksan-national-park.description: Landmark rocky outcrop with forest & mountain views at the summit, accessed via steep metal steps.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Seorak Waterpia
seoraksan-national-park.description: Sprawling spa featuring indoor/outdoor saunas & hot mineral-water pools, water slides & wave pools.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Seoraksan Sinheungsa Temple
seoraksan-national-park.description: Buddhist temple on mountain slope featuring a bronze Buddha statue, reachable by hike or cablecar.

seoraksan-national-park.name: Naksansa Temple
seoraksan-national-park.description: Historic Buddhist temple complex, rebuilt many times since its first construction, with stone cave.

sokcho-beach-downtown.name: Sokcho Beach
sokcho-beach-downtown.description: Popular beach for swimming, walking & shell collecting, backed by pine forest, resorts & eateries.

abai-village-lagoon.name: Pocheon Herb Island
abai-village-lagoon.description: Playful park offering an eclectic array of themed attractions, plus cafes & a souvenir shop.

abai-village-lagoon.name: Haedong Yonggungsa Temple
abai-village-lagoon.description: Enduring Buddhist temple constructed in the 14th-century & offering sweeping views of the sea.

abai-village-lagoon.name: Beopjusa Temple
abai-village-lagoon.description: Beopsang Buddhist temple founded by a monk, Uisin, in the 6th century & including over 60 buildings.

naksansa-temple-coast.name: Naksan Beach
naksansa-temple-coast.description: Family friendly, sandy beach backed by cafes, restaurants & hotels, with Buddhist temples nearby.

hahoe-folk-village.name: Andong Hahoe Folk Village
hahoe-folk-village.description: Characteristic Joseon Dynasty village, known for traditional Korean mask-making & other crafts.

hahoe-folk-village.name: Byeongsanseowon Confucian Academy
hahoe-folk-village.description: Centuries-old school complex of timber-framed pavilions ringed by mountains, with guided tours.

hahoe-folk-village.name: 락고재 하회 한옥호텔 - 초가 별관 Rakkojae Hahoe Hanok Hotel - Choga Annex
락고재 하회 한옥 호텔 - 기와 본관 Rakkojae Hahoe Hanok Hotel - Giwa Main Complex
Yangdong Folk Village
hahoe-folk-village.description: Old-fashioned village with many historic structures, including traditional thatch-roofed huts.

hahoe-folk-village.name: Bongjeongsa Temple
hahoe-folk-village.description: Centuries-old wooden temple featuring a stone pagoda in a tranquil mountain & forest setting.

andong-downtown.name: Dosan Seowon
andong-downtown.description: Established in 1574, this historic, tranquil Confucian academy is set in a lush, mountainous region.

dosan-seowon-confucian.name: Dosan Park
dosan-seowon-confucian.description: Tree-filled park with a memorial hall & statue devoted to its namesake, independence activist Dosan.

andong-mask-dance-area.name: 7-story Brick Pagoda at Beopheungsa Temple Site, Andong

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: Skyline Luge Tongyeong
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: Hillside cart ride for all ages on a twisting 1.5km track, plus a chairlift with city & sea views.

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: 이순신 공원
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: Waterfront parkland with an observation deck & cultural center, plus a statue of a revered general.

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: 동피랑 벽화마을
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: Tangle of painted houses & alleys atop a hill, with murals of animals, flowers & cartoon characters.

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: 장사도해상공원 까멜리아
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: This island park features trails amid gardens & sculptures, plus scenic views & an amphitheater.

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: Stanford Hotel&Resort Tongyeong
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: Sleek hotel offering a rooftop infinity pool, a Japanese restaurant & chic bars, plus sea views.

tongyeong-harbour-downtown.name: Tongdosa Temple
tongyeong-harbour-downtown.description: Buddhist temple known for having shrines rather than statues, in a complex with 35 buildings.

hansan-island-nearby.name: Hwangnyongsa Temple Site
hansan-island-nearby.description: Former site of a towering, 9-story temple built in the 7th century entirely without nails.

cable-car-mireuk-mountain.name: Palgongsan Cable Car
cable-car-mireuk-mountain.description: Mountain cable car offering scenic rides to a peak with a hiking trail & an area for food & drinks.

cable-car-mireuk-mountain.name: Mireuksan
cable-car-mireuk-mountain.description: This 462-m. mountain features a lookout platform which can be reached via a series of stairs.

dongpirang-mural-village.name: Jaman Mural Village
dongpirang-mural-village.description: Cluster of hillside houses & narrow passageways adorned with  a range of anime-style murals.

songdo-international-city.name: Songdo Central Park
songdo-international-city.description: Park inspired by New York's Central Park featuring paths, meadows & a manmade lake with water taxis.

songdo-international-city.name: 르 스페이스 인스파이어(Le Space）仁川迎仕柏渡假村
G-Tower
songdo-international-city.description: Ultra-modern skyscraper home to offices, eateries & an observation floor with city panoramas.

songdo-international-city.name: Songdo Bay Station (Songdo Cable Car)
songdo-international-city.description: Stalwart aerial tram, now with glass-bottom cars for views of the surrounding sea & mountains.

songdo-international-city.name: Incheon Grand Park
songdo-international-city.description: A zoo, botanical garden & large open areas are all located within this peaceful city park.

songdo-international-city.name: Songdo Cloud Trails
songdo-international-city.description: Winding walkway at Songdo Beach, with views of a lighthouse & a cable car line overhead.

songdo-international-city.name: Tri-bowl
songdo-international-city.description: Local landmark hosting a regular lineup of varied exhibitions, conferences & performances.

songdo-international-city.name: Jeondeungsa Temple
songdo-international-city.description: Colorfully painted, serene Buddhist temple compound with ornate carvings & many old-growth trees.

songdo-international-city.name: Sudoguksan Museum of Housing & Living, Incheon
Incheon Chinatown
songdo-international-city.description: Bustling tourist & cultural district known for its Chinese-owned restaurants & businesses.

songdo-international-city.name: Incheon Tourist Information Centre 인천종합관광안내소 仁川综合旅遊服務中心

incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.name: Jayu Park (Freedom Park)
incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.description: Paved trails wind through this hilly park known for spring cherry blossoms & dramatic fall foliage.

incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.name: Wolmi Theme Park
incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.description: Popular destination offering rides & an indoor playground for kids, including water activities.

incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.name: Songwol-dong Fairy Tale Village
incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.description: Many of the houses in this village are decorated in bright colours with depictions of fairy tales.

incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.name: Memorial Hall for Incheon Landing Operation
incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.description: Hilltop memorial & exhibition hall with photos & models commemorating a crucial Korean War battle.

incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.name: Sorae Ecology Park
incheon-chinatown-jayu-park.description: Tranquil park featuring salt marshes, migratory birds, observation areas & a nature center.

wolmido-island.name: My Land
wolmido-island.description: Sprawling amusement park featuring a variety of rides & activities, including an indoor playground.

wolmido-island.name: Korean traditional food & culture experience centre
Wolmido
wolmido-island.description: Upbeat island hangout with shopping, restaurants & a small amusement park with a Ferris wheel.

ganghwa-island-nearby.name: Ganghwa Peace Observatory
ganghwa-island-nearby.description: Complex on the North Korean border featuring information about the country & an observation deck.

ganghwa-island-nearby.name: Bomunsa
ganghwa-island-nearby.description: Elevated Buddhist temple built in 635, featuring a storied millstone, cave temple & sea vistas.
